Script.name: installer
Script.script:
INSTALLER_VERSION = "1.0.1" INSTALLER_REPO_USER = "fiedya" INSTALLER_REPO_NAME = "finalmud_scripts" FILES = { "core/main.lua", "core/utils.lua", "core/commands.lua", "modules/pathfinder.lua", "modules/herbs.lua", "modules/combat.lua" }
local _updateInProgress = false local _pendingDownloads = {}
local function trim(s) return (s:gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")) end
function _installer_debug(msg) cecho("[Installer Debug] " .. tostring(msg) .. "\n") end
local function _installer_safe(f, ...) local ok, result = pcall(f, ...) if not ok then cecho("[Installer ERROR] " .. tostring(result) .. "\n") _installer_debug(debug.traceback()) end return ok, result end
function checkScriptsVersion() local url = string.format("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/%s/%s/main/version.txt", INSTALLER_REPO_USER, INSTALLER_REPO_NAME) _installer_debug("Checking scripts version: " .. url) getHTTP(url) end
local function onVersionCheck(url, body) _installer_debug("onVersionCheck url=" .. tostring(url) .. ", body=" .. tostring(body)) if not body or #body == 0 then return end local remote = trim(body) if remote ~= INSTALLER_VERSION then cecho("<red>Masz nieaktualne skrypty! Wpisz <yellow>/zaktualizuj_skrypty\n") end end
if _installer_http_handler then _installer_debug("Killing old http handler") killAnonymousEventHandler(_installer_http_handler) end _installer_http_handler = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysGetHttpDone", function(_, url, body) _installer_debug("sysGetHttpDone: url=" .. tostring(url)) if url:find("version.txt") then _installer_safe(onVersionCheck, url, body) end end)
local function getTargetPath(filename) -- Always use getMudletHomeDir() for the current profile local path = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/" .. filename _installer_debug("getTargetPath(" .. filename .. ") = " .. path) return path end
local function downloadAndLoad(url, filename) local path = getTargetPath(filename) _pendingDownloads[path] = filename cecho(string.format("<cyan>[Installer] Pobieranie %s...\n", filename)) _installer_debug("Downloading " .. url .. " to " .. path) downloadFile(path, url) end
if _installer_download_handler then _installer_debug("Killing old download handler") killAnonymousEventHandler(_installer_download_handler) end _installer_download_handler = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", function(_, fname, success) _installer_debug("sysDownloadDone: fname=" .. tostring(fname) .. ", success=" .. tostring(success)) local filename = _pendingDownloads[fname] if filename then if success then cecho(string.format("<green>[Installer] Załadowano %s\n", filename)) else cecho(string.format("<red>[Installer] Błąd pobierania %s\n", filename)) end _pendingDownloads[fname] = nil -- If all downloads done, reload main script local anyLeft = false for _,v in pairs(_pendingDownloads) do anyLeft = true break end if not anyLeft then _updateInProgress = false local mainPath = getTargetPath("core/main.lua") cecho("<yellow>[Installer] Reloading scripts...\n") local ok, err = pcall(dofile, mainPath) if ok then cecho("<green>[Installer] Scripts reloaded.\n") else cecho(string.format("<red>[Installer] Reload error: %s\n", tostring(err))) _installer_debug("Reload error: " .. tostring(err)) end end else _installer_debug("sysDownloadDone: fname not in _pendingDownloads") end end)
function updateScripts() _installer_debug("updateScripts called, _updateInProgress=" .. tostring(_updateInProgress)) if _updateInProgress then cecho("<yellow>Aktualizacja już trwa...\n") return end _updateInProgress = true for _, filename in ipairs(FILES) do local url = string.format("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/%s/%s/main/%s", INSTALLER_REPO_USER, INSTALLER_REPO_NAME, filename) downloadAndLoad(url, filename) end end
if not installer_update_alias then _installer_debug("Registering /zaktualizuj_skrypty alias") installer_update_alias = tempAlias("^/zaktualizuj_skrypty$", function() _installer_safe(updateScripts) end) else _installer_debug("installer_update_alias already exists") end
_installer_debug("Installer loaded, calling checkScriptsVersion()") _installer_safe(checkScriptsVersion)
